h1.visual_description: Not present on this page, but inferred as a top-level bold numbered heading (e.g., '2. Main Section').

h2.visual_description: Bold, numbered with a decimal (e.g., 2.1.), left-aligned, same font size as body text.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Acronym or abbreviation definition, typically appearing as a note.
Data source attribution for preceding content or tables.
Footnote text located at the bottom of the page, separated by a horizontal line.
In-text parenthetical citation following Author-Date format.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page numbers centered at the bottom footer. Footnotes at the bottom left. Trailing notes from previous page content (Source, Abbreviations) at the top margin.
